title: rochelia retorta
intro: Rochelia retorta, also known as the twisted rochelia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rochelia retorta include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal infusion, made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
